response.original_title: Undeniable: The Evolution of Melbourne Hip Hop
response.overview: Hip hop is the most popular genre of music in the world. Nowhere is this more prevalent then in the city of Melbourne, Australia.  From Energy Transfer and Backstreet Boogie who brought breakdancing from the streets to the public’s attention, graffiti crews such as DMA and WCA bombing walls and trains, underground rap battles in the 1990s, to the mainstream rise of local MCs and producers in the 2000s, Undeniable captures the beats, the struggles and the triumphs of a city and hip-hop community that forged its own identity and movement.
response.title: Undeniable: The Evolution of Melbourne Hip Hop
